user.title: Configure Adaptive Pergola
user.description: Define the target actuator, pergola geometry and protection behavior.

data.name: Name
data.manual_override_reset: Reset timer on each manual change
data.closes_again_after_open: Closes again after the open point

data_description.name: Free-form name for this pergola configuration.
data_description.target_entity: Cover or number entity that receives the computed target value.
data_description.command_mode: Defines how the calculated target is written to the target entity.
data_description.command_value_min: For custom number ranges only: the lowest output value.
data_description.command_value_max: For custom number ranges only: the highest output value.
data_description.automatic_control: Automatically recompute target values whenever sun or weather changes.
data_description.auto_apply: Send calculated values directly to the actuator instead of only exposing a recommendation.
data_description.manual_override_duration: How long automation pauses after a manual movement before it takes over again.
data_description.manual_override_reset: If enabled, each additional manual movement restarts the override duration.
data_description.manual_threshold: Minimum position difference in percent that counts as a manual movement. Small deviations up to at least 3% are ignored.
data_description.manual_ignore_intermediate: Ignore opening/closing intermediate states while detecting manual movements.
data_description.tracking_mode: Choose whether the pergola prefers light, shade, or balances both.
data_description.slat_thickness_m: Material thickness of the slat in meters.
data_description.slat_axis_spacing_m: Distance between neighboring slat axes in meters.
data_description.slat_axis_height_m: Height of the slat axis above the protected area.
data_description.pergola_length_m: Pergola depth along the configured pergola orientation.
data_description.pergola_width_m: Pergola width perpendicular to the pergola orientation.
data_description.slat_axis_azimuth_deg: Direction of the physical slat hinge axis. The opposite direction describes the same axis line.
data_description.pergola_orientation_azimuth_deg: Direction from the house or rear edge toward the open front edge of the pergola.
data_description.opening_azimuth_deg: Direction toward which the slats open as the angle increases. It should be perpendicular to the slat axis.
data_description.closed_angle_deg: Slat angle for the fully closed position.
data_description.open_angle_deg: Upper limit for light opening. Max Light follows the real solar elevation up to this value, Max Shade uses light angle + 90° up to the travel limit, and Balanced uses it as the light-mode cap.
data_description.open_actuator_percent: Actuator percentage at which the open angle is reached. Example: If 90° is physically reached at 75%, enter 75 here.
data_description.closes_again_after_open: Enable this if the actuator keeps moving after the open point and the slat starts closing again.
data_description.has_house_attachment: Enable this when a house wall is attached directly to the rear edge of the pergola.
data_description.house_height_m: Height of the attached wall that direct sun may hit.
data_description.house_extends_left_m: Extra house width extending beyond the pergola on the left side.
data_description.house_extends_right_m: Extra house width extending beyond the pergola on the right side.
data_description.has_additional_protected_area: Enable this to check a second rectangular protected area in addition to the pergola footprint.
data_description.additional_protected_area_length_m: Length of the additional protected area along the pergola orientation.
data_description.additional_protected_area_width_m: Width of the additional protected area perpendicular to the pergola orientation.
data_description.additional_protected_area_offset_east_m: Offset of the additional protected area in metres toward east, measured from the rear-left pergola corner.
data_description.additional_protected_area_offset_north_m: Offset of the additional protected area in metres toward north, measured from the rear-left pergola corner.
data_description.max_direct_sun_depth_m: Allowed penetration depth of direct sun beneath the pergola before Balanced switches to shading.
data_description.open_before_sunrise_minutes: Optional pre-open window before sunrise to reduce condensation.
data_description.preopen_actuator_percent: Actuator position during the pre-open window.
data_description.is_raining_sensor: Binary sensor that reports active rain.
data_description.is_windy_sensor: Binary sensor that reports strong wind.
data_description.severe_sensors: Additional binary sensors for storm, hail or other lockout conditions.
data_description.wind_speed_threshold: Weather override activates at or above this wind speed.
data_description.rain_threshold: Weather override activates at or above this rain rate.
data_description.weather_override_position: Actuator position to use while the weather override is active.

error.invalid_target_domain: The selected target entity does not match the chosen command mode.
error.invalid_angle_range: Angles must satisfy closed angle ≤ open angle ≤ maximum angle.
error.invalid_percentage_range: The percentage value must be between 0 and 100.
error.invalid_custom_range: Minimum and maximum value for the custom range must differ.
error.invalid_house_height: House wall height must be greater than 0 when house attachment is enabled.
error.invalid_protected_area_size: The additional protected area requires a length and width greater than 0.
error.invalid_opening_direction: The opening direction must be roughly perpendicular to the slat axis.

abort.already_configured: A pergola configuration for this target entity already exists.
abort.invalid_import: The imported pergola configuration is invalid.

init.title: Adaptive Pergola options
init.description: Adjust geometry, protection logic and weather thresholds for the existing pergola.
